summary: Core character creation pipeline completed successfully. Three specialists dispatched sequentially: (1) protagonist-profiler created deep psychological profiles for both romantic leads — Kaelith Maren (CHAR-001, 28KB) and Lirien Dael (CHAR-002, 37KB) — plus the character index with relationship web; (2) character-voice-designer refined and expanded voice fingerprints to 13 parameters plus 7 dialogue pattern fields per character, with secondary sensory channels and a 12-dimension voice contrast matrix in the index; (3) romance-arc-designer created the romance arc blueprint with 7 stages, 8-step vulnerability ladder, black moment design, and HFN resolution. All artifacts are schema-compliant and cross-referenced.

invariantsEnforced: INV-003 (Character Voice Distinctness): 13 voice parameters + 7 dialogue patterns per character, 12-dimension contrast matrix
INV-008 (Character Agency): Both leads have documented agency — active choices driving plot
INV-034/T17 (POV 3-4 Sentence Test): Voice distinction guide in index.json; Kaelith sees buildings/Lirien sees people
T7 (Black Moment): Designed — kill contract revelation destroys trust, both leads' wounds activated
T8 (Internal+External Resistance): 3 internal + 4 external resistance layers mapped per character
T12 (Dual-Arc Interleave): Romance stages mapped to fantasy arc progression
T21 (Vulnerability Ladder): 8-step alternating ladder with escalating emotional cost
T20 (Emotional Throughline): Per-character emotional states tracked through arc turning points
metadata.schemaCompliance: All files validated against characters.schema.md and romance-arc-design.schema.md
